_notes: Hand-curated foundry highlights. Unlike vendor data (Xur, Ada-1, etc.), Bungie has NO API for 'current featured foundry weapons' — these channels in Kyber track community-curated weapon spotlights + god-roll callouts. Refresh this file each Episode when the meta shifts. The /hakke /suros /tex-mechanica bot commands read this.

hakke.tagline: Aggressive militarism — reliable, no-frills weapons designed for the front line.
hakke.weapon_style: Bullpup pulse rifles, double-shot fusion frames, kinetic SMGs. Häkke weapons lean into reliability over flash; the foundry-style perk pool emphasizes Threat Detector + Surrounded + Outlaw.

featured_weapons.name: BxR-55 Battler
featured_weapons.context: Returning Adept weapon from Crucible playlists; god roll: Killing Wind + Headstone.

featured_weapons.name: Sojourner's Tale
featured_weapons.context: Vanguard playlist; lightweight frame for ad-clear; pair with Threat Detector + One-Two Punch.

featured_weapons.name: Fioritura-59
featured_weapons.context: Adept Crucible weapon; god roll: Encore + Kill Clip for sustained PvP duels.

featured_weapons.name: Krait
featured_weapons.context: Vanguard weapon (returning); Threat Detector + Frenzy is the close-quarters god roll.

suros.tagline: Precision engineering with futuristic styling — low recoil, smooth-shooting weapons that reward marksmanship.
suros.weapon_style: Pulse rifles, scout rifles, and auto rifles with the iconic red-and-white aesthetic. SUROS weapons traditionally favor the precision archetype with low-recoil patterns and high handling.

featured_weapons.name: SUROS Regime
featured_weapons.context: Exotic. Spinning Up + Dual Speed Receiver intrinsic — the OG SUROS exotic, still strong in PvE.

featured_weapons.name: DARCI
featured_weapons.context: Exotic. Targeting damage buff against marked enemies — niche but great vs single high-HP bosses.

featured_weapons.name: Halfdan-D
featured_weapons.context: Vanguard playlist auto rifle (SUROS-styled); Subsistence + Adrenaline Junkie chains well in PvE.

featured_weapons.name: BxR-55 Battler
featured_weapons.context: Also listed under Häkke — the Battler frame is co-branded. Crucible Adept god roll: Killing Wind + Headstone.

tex-mechanica.tagline: Wild-west kinetic — hand cannons, lever-action rifles, and gambling-themed exotics that hit hard and look mean.
tex-mechanica.weapon_style: Hand cannons (the foundry's signature), lever-action scouts, and Stasis-themed lever pulses. Tex Mechanica weapons reward precise hits over volume of fire; perk pools favor Triple Tap + Vorpal + Explosive Payload on HCs.

featured_weapons.name: The Last Word
featured_weapons.context: Exotic. Hip-fire-only kinetic HC; the original D1-era Tex Mechanica exotic. Still strong in PvP for top-tier players.

featured_weapons.name: Eyasluna
featured_weapons.context: Grasp of Avarice raid drop; god roll: Killing Wind + Headstone or Frenzy. PvP S-tier when Stasis is meta.

featured_weapons.name: Lever-Action (Tex Mechanica)
featured_weapons.context: Seasonal Tex Mechanica lever-action scout. High aim-assist + craftable with Headstone + Frenzy is endgame ad-clear.

featured_weapons.name: Last Hope
featured_weapons.context: Crucible Adept Tex sidearm; OG craftable with Snapshot Sights + Kill Clip for PvP dueling.
